{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Monarch's ancient script
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Monarch's ancient script]] can contain complex symbols with specific colors.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
